RETURN.description: the replacement characters, or null if no escaping was needed

RETURN.content: the replacement characters, or null if no escaping was needed

RETURN.content: the returned string is the escaped form of the input string starting from the given index.

PARAM.description: the sequence of characters from which to decode the code point, not null
PARAM.name: seq
